zh.lifeSummary: Teresia Sarah Miller是Edward Miller和Martha Miller的女兒，於1720年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰查爾斯聖 馬雷斯 帕里什。她於從1745年1月到1745年12月與Matthew Cartwright在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰查爾斯聖 馬雷斯 帕里什結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1754年享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Teresia Sarah Miller是Edward Miller和Martha Miller的女儿，于1720年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰查爾斯聖 馬雷斯 帕里什。她于从1745年1月到1745年12月与Matthew Cartwright在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰查爾斯聖 馬雷斯 帕里什结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1754年享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Miller
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a miller. The standard modern vocabulary word represents the northern Middle English term miller, an agent derivative of mille ‘mill’, reinforced by Old Norse mylnari (see Milner ). In southern, western, and central England Millward (literally, ‘mill keeper’) was the usual term. In North America, the surname Miller has absorbed many cognate surnames from other languages, for example German Müller (see Mueller ), Dutch Mulder and Molenaar , French Meunier , Italian Molinaro , Spanish Molinero , Hungarian Molnár (see Molnar ), Slovenian, Croatian, and Serbian Mlinar , Polish Młynarz or Młynarczyk (see Mlynarczyk ). Miller (including in the senses below) is the seventh most frequent surname in the US.

South German, Swiss German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Müller ‘miller’ (see Mueller ) and, in North America, also an altered form of this. This form of the surname is also found in other European countries, notably in Poland, Denmark, France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), and Czechia; compare 3 below.
Americanized form of Polish, Czech, Croatian, Serbian, and Slovenian   Miler   ‘miller’, a surname of German origin.

variants.name: Millar
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Miller  . It is also found in Ireland (especially Antrim).

variants.name: Mueller
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Erwin, Fritz, Gerhard, Klaus, Heinz, Helmut, Wolfgang, Manfred, Horst.

German (mainly Müller) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Müller); Dutch: occupational name for a miller, Middle High German müller, German Müller. In Germany, Müller, Mueller is the most frequent of all surnames; in the US it is often changed to Miller or appears as Muller . See also Mulder .

variants.name: Milner
meanings: English (northern, especially Yorkshire): variant of Miller , retaining the -n- of the Middle English word milnere ‘miller’.

variants.name: Millward
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): occupational name from Middle English milne-ward, mille-ward ‘keeper of a mill, miller’ (Old English mylen-weard). In southern England and the West Midlands this was a standard medieval term for a miller. Compare Miller .

variants.name: McMiller
meanings: Scottish: patronymic from the occupational byname   Miller  .

nameMeanings.name: Teresia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of problematic origin. The name seems to have been first used in Spain and Portugal, and, according to tradition, was the name of the wife of St Paulinus of Nola, who spent most of his life in Spain; she was said to have originated (and to have derived her name) from the Greek island of Thēra. However, this story is neither factually nor etymologically confirmed.

variants.name: Teresa
meanings: form of   Theresa .  In the English-speaking world the name is often chosen in this spelling by Roman Catholics, with particular reference to the Spanish saint, Teresa of Ávila (  Teresa Cepeda de Ahumada ,  1515–82 ).

variants.name: Treeza
meanings: Modern contracted spelling of   Theresa   or Anglicization of Irish Treasa .

variants.name: Theresia
meanings: Of problematic origin. The name seems to have been first used in Spain and Portugal, and, according to tradition, was the name of the wife of St Paulinus of Nola, who spent most of his life in Spain; she was said to have originated (and to have derived her name) from the Greek island of Thēra. However, this story is neither factually nor etymologically confirmed.

variants.name: Terese
meanings: Of problematic origin. The name seems to have been first used in Spain and Portugal, and, according to tradition, was the name of the wife of St Paulinus of Nola, who spent most of his life in Spain; she was said to have originated (and to have derived her name) from the Greek island of Thēra. However, this story is neither factually nor etymologically confirmed.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: Teresia Sarah Miller was born in 1720, in St Marys Parish, Charles, Maryland, British Colonial America as the daughter of Edward Miller and Martha Miller. She married Matthew Cartwright from January 1745 to December 1745, in St Marys Parish, Charles, Maryland, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1754, at the age of 34.

Elle est décédée en 1754, à l’âge de 34 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Teresia Sarah Millerは1720年にイギリス植民地アメリカメリーランド州チャーレススト マリス パーイッシュでEdward MillerとMartha Millerの娘として生まれた。から1745年1月まで1745年12月にイギリス植民地アメリカメリーランド州チャーレススト マリス パーイッシュでMatthew Cartwrightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1754年に34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Teresia Sarah Miller(은)는 1720년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 찰스 스트 마이스 파리시에서 Edward Miller(와)과 Martha Miller의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1745년 1월 부터 1745년 12월 까지 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 찰스 스트 마이스 파리시에서 Matthew Cartwright(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1754년 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.St Marys Parish, Charles, Maryland, Brit: ст мэрис пэриш, чарльс, Мэриленд, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Teresia Sarah Miller родилась в 1720 г. в местности ст мэрис пэриш, чарльс, Мэриленд, бритиш колоняль амирика. Её родителей звали Edward Miller и Martha Miller. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Matthew Cartwright с январь 1745 по декабрь 1745 в местности ст мэрис пэриш, чарльс, Мэриленд, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1754 г. в возрасте 34 лет.
